messages.message: I propose coordination in the Mediterranean. I can focus on securing Southern Italy while you handle the Western Front. Let's discuss how we can support each other's movements.
Hi Italy! The standard IA is always in the way, so I'm happy to go another route if you're interested.
I have no interest in conflict with you. If you focus East or North, I will remain neutral and not challenge your moves in the region.
Hi Germany! I find us to be natural allies and was hoping to be able to keep each other in the loop about Russian plans if that's agreeable.
Absolutely! The central powers always work out so well together if we can stick together

Hi Russia! What are you thinking for the early game? Turkey has also said he has no interest in conflict with me, so he's probably heading north. Would you consider a bounce in Galicia to hide a potential R/T alliance for the first year?

Hey Russia!
I hope you're well and I wish you luck in the game!
I think we both know we can get off to a great start if we work together. I'd love to juggernaut in this game if you'd be down! I'm going to request a bounce in Black Sea this year, but I am open to ideas on how to open the game. What are your thoughts?
Have you talked to Russia yet?

Hey England! I wish you the best of luck in the game! I am very much aware of the possibility of us sharing a border at some point, and I am very interested in making an alliance with you in the future!
I suggest we avoid confrontation. If you move toward Greece or the Balkans, I will not attempt to expand into your sphere in the South.

Hey Germany! I wish you the best of luck in the game! I am very much aware of the possibility of us sharing a border at some point, and I am very interested in making an alliance with you in the future!
I sent him a message but haven't heard back. I'll let you know what he says.

Hey Turkey!
I definitely agree that RT is one of the most fun alliances in the game, and I'm definitely down for it.

I think in the interest of keeping our momentum going a bit, and keeping the East more or less as a DMZ, I would be most comfortable if we bounced in Bla. However, let me know if that's not your preference, and we can discuss it more.

Also, have you heard much from Italy/austria yet?

Hey France! I wish you the best of luck in the game! I am very much aware of the possibility of us sharing a border at some point, and I am very interested in making an alliance with you in the future!
Sounds good
Sounds good, we will have to see what the future brings

Hey Austria!
I wish you the best of luck in the game!
I'm open to any ideas you might have in this early years. I really enjoy T/A alliances, as I think they can be very effective in the midgame.

Hey Austria!

I would like to discuss a DMZ in Gal, so I can focus north. But, let me know if that's not your preference, and we can discuss it more.

Also, have you heard much from Italy/turkey yet?

Hey Italy!
I wish you the best of luck in the game!
I'm very happy to hear your suggestion of a conflict-free south! I do hope we can work together well in the future
Hi France! It looks like Italy is headed east, so you might be able to grab a center of the med in the first year.
Absolutely!

Hey England!

As I assume you know, war between our nations is a bad idea. I would like to open up some lines of communication, and hopefully we can agree on a mutual Norway/sweden split. If you need help against Germany, I would be happy to assist!

Let me know what you think.
Let's see how the game plays out!

Hey France!

I think our countries are natural allies. Would you be interested in taking out England or Germany, or maybe both?

Let me know what you're thinking.

Turkey has sent me a one-sentence greeting. Italy was a little less forthcoming.

DMZ is fine with me if you're willing to bounce. I'd rather not have to worry about one of your armies sneaking into Vienna.
Hey Italy! I definitely agree, we both have bigger things to worry about than attacking each other this early. DMZ in Gol, WMS and Pie?

Hey Russia!

Definitely agree, England and Germany are always in our way. How do you want to proceed? If you move an army to Stp I can try to stop England from getting a second build in 1901, at the same time you try to take Sweden?

Yep! Bounce in Black Sea is no problem. I'm more than happy to do that in the beginning, and it's the bounce I would have asked for originally anyways.

I've had pretty minimal interaction with Austria, and some with Italy. They both seem pretty timid/defensive, which is to be expected in the beginning of the game, as most people aren't willing to take risks.

We can get a great opening going if we can manage to convince Italy and Austria to get into a conflict, as it would leave Austria open for both of us to move in!

Hey Germany!

As I assume you know, war between our nations is a bad idea. I would like to open up some lines of communication, and hopefully we can agree on a mutual Norway/sweden split. If you need help against England, I would be happy to assist!

Let me know what you think.
Hi Turkey! I agree that AT can be very effective later in the game. What are your plans for the first year? I'm still in discussions with Russia and Italy.
Absolutely, I agree. Are you moving Moscow up or south?
Hi Austria! Thanks for the info, I'll consider it. How are you going with Turkey and Russia? Any ideas of how they might react to each other?
Hi Turkey, good luck to you as well! I'd be interested in an alliance too, hopefully we can make it work!
Hi England! I'm happy to share information with you about Russia if you'll do the same for me.

Hello Russia,

I agree that we should avoid a conflict in Scandinavia. I think a Norway/sweden split is fair, and I'm happy to work with you against Germany. I don't think I will make a move on them this turn, but we can coordinate our moves in the future.

Looking forward to the game!

Hey England!

How do you want to approach this game? Would you be interested in working together against Germany? If you open Lvp - Yor, Edi - Nor, Lon - North Sea, I could support you into Belgium in the autumn turn.

Hello Austria,

Happy to do that. So far it seems like we will be splitting Scandinavia, but I'm not sure how the German/russian situation will play out. I'll keep you updated.

I've had conversations with both Russia and Italy as well. I'm more than happy to discuss plans with you, but the specifics will likely depend on what your ideas are regarding the Balkans.

Personally, I'm quite happy to see you secure Serbia and Greece. I can leave Rumania and Bulgaria to you. If we are to have a lasting alliance, I would be more than happy to keep our centers relatively unguarded.

Russia and I have discussed a bounce in Black Sea, but that is mostly to keep the conflict between us limited.
Sounds good.
Thank you! I appreciate your support. Let's keep the southern Mediterranean peaceful and focus on expanding elsewhere. If you move toward the Balkans, I'll stay clear of your path.

Hey France!

Yes, I would be down to take out England quickly. I'm going to try and DMZ with England in the Spring, but once they see a move to Stp, we'll be all set. I'll let you know what Germany says about Sweden.

Looking forward to working with you!

Hey Germany!

How do you want to approach this game? Would you be interested in working together against England? If you open with Kie - Den, Ber - Kie and Mun - Ruh we could keep England from getting a second build.

Yeah! I'm always down to try something new!
We don't have to make a direct attack on Russia right away. I'm sure we will be sharing a border at some point, so it's good to have some sort of relationship now.

Hey France,

That sounds good to me. I agree, I think us working together would be good. Russia seems friendly to me, but I'll have to see how they play out in the south.

Looking forward to the game!
Not yet. They're both being a bit cagey.
Hey Turkey! Good luck to you too, I'm sure we'll have the chance to work together at some point.
Thanks.
A DMZ in the Golfo, Western Med, and Piedmont sounds reasonable. I'll hold my forces in the south while you secure the west. Let's coordinate further on mutual support.
Yeah that's how it usually is... It's hard to know where someone stands this early.
Definitely. Have you talked to him yet?
Yeah we could potentially have a third ally depending on what's going on in the east and with England and Germany.
Great to hear! I'm looking forward too.
What do you think about an alliance against France?
I appreciate your response. I'll keep my focus on the south and west, leaving your eastern and northern fronts undisturbed.
Sounds good! I'll let you know if I hear anything.

Hi Italy,

Just wanted to say hi!

-England
Yep. Russia seems friendly to me, so they're likely focused on the South.
I've messaged him, but not much more than establishing a DMZ in the channel. He hasn't responded to that message yet, although he did confirm he was moving Lvp - Yor.
Great. Thanks.
That sounds great!
Haven't decided yet. What do you think?
I'd prefer it to go south, that always leaves a bigger target on you.
I'm sure we will

I agree—let’s explore involving another power in a loose alliance if the situation allows. Meanwhile, I’ll hold Southern Italy secure and support your Western Med focus. Let me know how coordination could look early next round.

Hi Germany,

It might be a good idea, I'll have to see how the situation plays out with them. What are your thoughts?

-England
Russia has asked for a DMZ in Galicia, so he will likely be moving Sev to Bla or Rum. If I get in there he'll know we're working together.
Agreed. Russia seems pretty nice and communicative as well. The bounce in Black Sea is expected as well, as that is the most common opening move.
Yeah he messaged me saying he was going to see what the situation was with you.

Hello England! I hope all is well. I’m focusing on securing Southern Italy and coordinating with France in the Mediterranean. No immediate plans to challenge your positions—let’s keep things peaceful for now.

Hey England!

Have you heard anything from Germany? I'm not sure what they're thinking...
Yep.
You're right. But, I also need to hear from Austria/turkey before I can confirm.
Russia and I are also planning on attacking him, so the three of us could work well together.
Great. Are you planning a Lepanto?
Well we can get you into Belgium as long as you don't open with the channel.
Yeah, they mentioned potentially moving against France. Not sure if it's genuine though.
Thanks again! I’ll leave the Balkans to you and focus on the south. If you see an opening to push into Greece or Bulgaria, I’ll make sure not to interfere. Let’s keep our mutual areas clear.
Turkey hasn't said much but Austria has asked me what you're doing so I'm guessing he wants to work with you.
How's the situation in the South looking?
Perfect
France said you guys had a DMZ. Did he break that?
Cool. Are you okay with me moving to Burgundy this spring to make it look like we are fighting?
And if so are you willing to go West?
Sounds good. How's the situation looking in the South?
No. Move to Picardy and then to Belgium
Sounds good, thanks for the heads up!
Okay sounds good! Let's see if we can't convince them of that.
Ok. What do you plan to do about Galicia? I'd prefer it to be left unoccupied.
France and I did agree on a DMZ in certain areas, but I have no intention of breaking it or engaging in conflict with him. I prefer to keep things peaceful with all powers unless provoked.
Okay sounds good.
Sure. How's the situation looking in the South?
Austria and Russia have said they're not fighting so I'm gonna have to see what Russia does
Yep!
That's what I'm thinking. Have you talked much with England/france?
Agreed. I'm glad you're keeping an open mind.
As for moving West—I’m focused on securing Southern Italy and the Mediterranean. I don’t see myself challenging your western front unless it threatens my interests.
Yes a little, I'm gonna see how this first year pans out

Okay, I'm down to bounce.

Would you like to keep up the appearance of us being hostile?
Are you moving to the channel?
Cool! Good luck!
Things are calm in the South for now. I’m securing my supply centers and coordinating with France in the Mediterranean. No immediate pressure on your positions—let’s keep it peaceful.
Okay
Thanks, you too
That works for me.

Agreed. I'm glad we're on the same page. Let's continue to keep our areas free of conflict—I’ll watch the south while you handle the Balkans. If you see an opportunity to expand east or west, I’ll stay out of your way.
Cool, I'll plan on it.
Sounds good
We're bouncing.
Good. I respect your position and intend to keep our fronts separate. I’m focused on securing Southern Italy and the Mediterranean, and I’ll avoid any moves that threaten your interests in the west.
It's looking pretty good.
Sounds like a plan to me!

Sounds like a plan to me! I’ll keep the southern Mediterranean clear for you and focus on securing my own supply centers. If you see any opportunities in Greece or Bulgaria, I’ll stay out of your way completely.
Ok, sounds good!
Thanks for letting me know
So you're gonna the channel?
Just confirming the bounce in Black Sea!

You're welcome! I appreciate the understanding. Let's keep our fronts separated—I’ll focus on securing Southern Italy and the Mediterranean, and I’ll avoid any moves that could threaten your western front.
Ok!
Yep, sounds good!
Do you think we might be able to get Italy and Austria to attack each other? I don't have a strong feeling, but that would be extremely helpful for us
No. I'm going for Norway this turn.

Great to hear! I'll make sure to keep the southern Mediterranean free for your operations. If you ever need support or coordination further east, feel free to reach out. Let’s keep this peaceful front solid!
Ok cool
Would you be interested in taking out Turkey first?
Same
Have you heard much from Italy?
You might be able to get Austria to attack Italy... I'm still working on it.

You're welcome! I appreciate the mutual understanding. Let’s keep our fronts separate—I’ll focus on securing Southern Italy and the Mediterranean, and I’ll avoid any moves that could threaten your western front. If you see any opportunities or need coordination further north, feel free to reach out.

Hey Italy!

I think our countries are natural allies. Would you be interested in taking out Austria or Turkey first, and then the other?

Thank you for the suggestion, but I prefer to maintain peace for now and focus on securing Southern Italy and the Mediterranean. I have no immediate interest in taking out Austria or Turkey. Let’s see how the game unfolds.
Heads up - Italy confirmed to me that they're not planning on moving on Austria.
Sounds good!
Ok, thanks for the heads up! I'll focus on making sure they don't interfere in the Balkans.
Alright will do. What about Austria?
Hey Italy! Just wanted to make sure that you are ok with me moving to Greece in 1902. I would prefer to leave it open for the spring
Sounds good.
I'd like to see how Italy opens first.

Of course, I'm fine with your move to Greece in 1902. I’ll keep Southern Italy secure and avoid any interference in your operations. Let’s maintain our peaceful front and focus on expansion separately.

Regarding Austria—I have no plans to challenge them directly. I’m focused on securing Southern Italy and the Mediterranean, so I don’t foresee any conflict with their movements unless they provoke one.
Fair enough.
A little, but not much. Are you still interested in moving to Stp?
Possibly, but I don't think I'm gonna do it in Spring. I'll let you know when I decide.
Okay, let me know!
I will.
That sounds great to me!
I still think that a bounce in Norway would help prevent England from getting a second build, and it's possible that he'd try to take it with his fleet.
That's still the plan. I just want to see how Spring goes before deciding for sure.
Are you moving Liverpool to Edinburgh or Yorkshire?
Sounds good.
Italy is going to focus on the Med. They don't plan on provoking you.
Okay, sounds good.
I'm planning to, but only to bounce with England.
Okay perfect
Edinburgh.
How are things looking for you?
He said he was going to the Channel so you'll need to bounce him.
Okay thanks for the heads up!
Yeah, anything you need help with?

Not at the moment! We're doing the standard bounce in Black Sea and I'm moving my army to Constantinople. I just want to make sure we're able to work together down the line.

I don't know if England and Germany are planning on working together, but just be careful.
That's smart, Russia can be a threat to both of us if he gets out of his corner. And yeah I've been talking to both of them, it's still hard to say who's working with who.
Ok, good luck!
I'd be interested in seeing what Italy's plans are. He seems pretty set on keeping the southern seas free.
Thanks! He does seem intent on heading east. I'm not sure what he's up to, but I'm happy to help if you need it.
Ok, I'll keep an eye out for his moves
Thank you.
Germany tells me he's not worried about Russia. That's probably bad news for you.
Germany told me they are worried about Russia, and that they might go for Holland. What do you think?
Yes, that sounds likely. We should try to stop them from taking Holland and Belgium.
If you open with Edi - NWS, Lon - NOR, Lvp - Yor we should be able to keep them out of Belgium. Have you been talking to Russia about moving an army to Norway to help keep Germany out of Sweden?
Yes, that sounds good. I'll do that.
Great!
You think they're working together? I thought Germany and England were going to work together to take out Russia.
They might be, but I've heard they aren't. Germany told me they aren't working together. Just be careful!
That's interesting. England told me that Germany was planning on attacking me, so I'm not sure who to believe.

Hey Italy!

Any interest in hitting Trieste?
Looks like everything is going to plan. Any interest in letting me into Sweden?
Well that went well! Are you good for no bounces this year?
Yes, absolutely! We're all set!
I'm assuming you'll support yourself into Rumania?

Hi! I'm focused on securing southern Italy and Western Mediterranean for now. Trieste is closer to Austria and further from our current interests. If you're aiming eastward, maybe we can talk about that later.
Sure, you'll need it against Turkey

So, looks like Germany tried to move to Burgundy, which is unfortunate. I'll have to support my convoy from Yorkshire to Belgium with my North Sea fleet, but I think you should be able to get it next year.
Sounds good. Let me know if you hear anything interesting from Turkey/austria!

I haven’t noticed any immediate threats from Turkey or Austria, but I’ll keep an eye on their movements. If Russia continues eastward into Galicia or Ukraine, I’ll let you know if I see any opportunities or risks from Italy’s perspective.
I think Turkey and Italy are going for a Lepanto, but I'm not 100% sure. I'm glad to see that you and Germany have a truce, since that gives you the freedom to move south and north.
Are you planning to support yourself into Bel or protect Mar? I'd be happy to coordinate against Italy next year if you're open to it.
No problem, let me know what you think
Thanks for the support. I'll support your army in so you can use your fleet to take Norway.
Thank you. I'm curious to see whether he'll support himself into Mar or take a shot at Bel.
Yeah Germany really messed up. Thanks, I'd be open to that.
So, will you be moving to Tunis this turn? I don't want us to accidentally bounce in Greece!

I plan to maintain a careful approach in the Balkans and will not move into Greece. I will focus instead on securing southern Italy and potentially moving into Tunis if opportunities arise. Rest assured, I have no intention of challenging your position there.
What do you think he'll do with his army in Pie?
Great, thanks.
Perfect, thanks!
Yes, I will. What are you thinking for this year?
What do you plan to do with your army in Pie?
Yeah, that's what I'm hoping for.
Trieste is not a priority for me at this moment—I’m keeping my focus on southern Italy and the Western Mediterranean. I’ll monitor Austria’s movements and let you know if their strategy shifts.
I plan to hold my army in Pie for now, focusing on securing southern Italy and maintaining stability in the region. I have no intention of interfering with your interests further east.
Great, thanks!
What's your plan for this turn?
Ok, thank you very much!
Is there anything I can do to help?
Sounds good, thanks!
I'll be trying to move into Greece.
Good luck this year!

I appreciate your offer to help. For now, I intend to hold southern Italy firmly and avoid any escalation in the region. If your focus remains on the east, I see no reason for us to clash. Let’s keep the Balkans quiet for mutual benefit.

I’ll be reinforcing my army in ROM and VEN to prepare for any potential shifts in the Western Mediterranean. If you’re still committed to our DMZ agreement, I suggest we coordinate our next moves toward Tunis—let me know your plans.
Yes, I am still committed to the DMZ. I assume you will take Tunis with your fleet in the Ionian?
I'm not sure, he said that he wanted to keep his options open. If I have to I can bounce him out of Marseilles, but I'd rather not.
I'll be moving into Greece and Ankara to Constantinople. I'm assuming we'll continue to bounce in the Black Sea?
What are your thoughts on Scandinavia?
Yep, sounds good!

I intend to support your DMZ by moving my army from ROM to TUS to prepare for a joint push into Tunis. My fleet at NAP will also support this move. Let me know if your forces are ready to secure Gol and WMS so we can coordinate our advance.
What are your thoughts on Germany?
What are you planning on doing with your armies in Ven and Pie?
They seem peaceful enough, but we'll see what their builds look like. Have you heard anything?

I intend to move my army from VEN to PIE to strengthen our Western Mediterranean front, while my army from ROM moves to TUS to support our joint Tunisian ambitions. I expect your forces to hold Gol and WMS securely so we can coordinate an advance next phase. Let me know if you agree or have adjustments.
I don't think you're going to get it. I'll bounce him out for you but that is your only shot for a build this turn.
He hasn't said. He's just heading for the med
Why did you move to Livonia?
Ok, sounds good!
I do not want you to move into Pie, as that would put your army right next to Marseilles.
To move to Sweden in the Winter.
Great.
Ok I'm trusting you.
Just don't build in Stp this turn and we'll be good
I think you're right. He has too many options and wants to ensure that he can get into Mar. If he's successful and you bounce Bel and I bounce Gre, Italy will get no builds.
Okay.
He just told me the same thing.
Hi Austria, just checking in. How's your relationship with Germany and Italy?

Understood, I will not move into Pie. Instead, I will move my army from VEN to TUS to support our joint Tunisian ambitions. I expect your forces to hold Gol and WMS securely so we can coordinate an advance next phase.
Are you taking Holland?
The only thing I've heard is that they are focused on the south.
Italy is the least talkative. I think it's a bad sign. Germany and I are friendly but obviously it's too early to tell.
Yeah, definitely hard to tell so early. It's the same with Germany and me. I'm not sure if they're coordinating against France or you.
Agreed, sounds good.
That would be ideal, although I think he's more likely to move to Tunis.
Understood, I will proceed with moving A VEN to TUS and coordinating with your forces at Gol and WMS. I suggest we finalize our Tunisian strategy soon so we can act decisively next phase.
I suspect France is their target. I don't think Germany will give up a chance to get three builds by antagonizing France so soon.
Okay, I'm still planning on moving to Mar to protect against you.
I'd be very surprised if he did.
Did you and Germany agree on who would get Belgium? I'm assuming you would like to land your army in Norway.
Yeah.
Yeah, that makes sense.

I will proceed with moving A VEN to TUS and coordinating with your forces at Gol and WMS. To ensure our joint Tunisian ambitions remain aligned, I suggest we finalize our strategy soon so we can act decisively next phase.
Sounds good!

Makes sense
Awesome. Looking forward to working with you.
We haven't discussed Belgium yet. I'm going to go for it.
Yeah, you should be able to get Norway.
Great.

Yeah, me too.
Idk yet.

Sounds good.
Thanks, same to you.
Ok

Are you convoying to Belgium or just taking it?
Are you thinking of taking Rumania this turn or just holding onto Serbia?
I'm going to convoy to Belgium.
Pretty standard so far. Austria and Italy both seem willing to go for some sort of alliance, which is good for me.
Hey Germany, can you please move your army back to Munich? I'm still willing to work with you and Russia against England.
I'm assuming you'll be bouncing with Russia in Sweden?

Looks like that didn't work out the way we'd planned. England is still getting a build from Belgium, so I'm not sure if you'd be able to take Norway. But we can still attack England if you're up for it.
Okay. I've been friendly with Austria, they seem worried about the Italy/germany situation.
Yep, I'd be up for it.
Yeah I'll move back. Just didn't want you in Burgundy.

Understood, your movement to MAR is acceptable as long as Gol and WMS remain secure for our DMZ. I will proceed with moving A VEN to TUS and F NAP supporting APU as planned. Let’s confirm your positions at Gol and WMS so we align our Tunisian strategy effectively next phase.
What are you thinking?
Yeah, I'm not planning to move to either of them.
Cool, let's wait to attack him until 1902. I think he'll still be occupied in the West for a while.
Yes, they seem to be.
Yep, that's true.
We're going to wait to see what they build before deciding on Sweden.
Yep, sounds good.
Ok sounds good
I'm just going to try to get Greece and see what Austria and Russia do.

What is he telling you?
That he's moving to Tunis, but I don't know how truthful that is. He said that he wants to DMZ Piedmont and Ionian, so he's obviously going somewhere with that fleet.

Yeah, he hasn't told me anything about the Ionian.
I haven't really given him any other info. I don't think he would tell Austria that I told you about him moving to Greece
Yeah that's true.

So I could take Sweden, and then build in Stp and take Norway.
That's why I said don't build in Stp.
Germany is telling me they are not going to go for Belgium, and I believe them, since they seem to want to work with me. You should still support me though.
Same here.
